---
title: "Assignment 2: Word Count of 10-K Filings over Time"
subtitle: "RCT Summer 2026"
author: "Fikir Worku Edossa"
institute: "Humboldt-Universität zu Berlin"
date: last-modified
date-format: long
fontsize: "10pt"
bibliography: references.bib
format:
  beamer:
    slide-level: 2
    number-sections: false
    toc: false
classoption: "aspectratio=169"
execute:
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{booktabs}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)

results     <- readRDS("../output/results.rds")
annual_data <- results$annual_data
highlights  <- results$highlights
```

## Research Question

- Do 10-K filings continue to grow longer over time?
- Replicates @DLS2017 using the EDGAR 10-K dataset
- Extends their sample period (1996–2013) to `r strsplit(highlights$year_range, "–")[[1]][2]`

## Data

```{r, results="asis"}
years <- strsplit(highlights$year_range, "–")[[1]]
cat(sprintf(
  "- EDGAR 10-K dataset (TRR266 server), accessed via DuckDB over HTTPS\n- Filters: $\\geq$ 3,000 words, successful download, one per firm per year\n- %s firm-year observations from %s firms, %s",
  format(highlights$sample_size, big.mark = ","),
  format(highlights$n_firms, big.mark = ","),
  highlights$year_range
))
```

## 10-K Word Count over Time

```{r, fig.width=7, fig.height=3.5}
results$length_figure + theme_minimal(base_size = 8)
```

## Conclusion

```{r, results="asis"}
change <- highlights$median_words_last - highlights$median_words_first
pct    <- round(100 * change / highlights$median_words_first)
years  <- strsplit(highlights$year_range, "–")[[1]]
cat(sprintf(
  "- Median word count: %s words (%s) $\\to$ %s words (%s)\n- Increase of approximately %d\\%%",
  format(highlights$median_words_first, big.mark = ","), years[1],
  format(highlights$median_words_last, big.mark = ","), years[2],
  pct
))
```

- The time trend of @DLS2017 continues beyond their sample period

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
